title: Vithoba Temple
tagline: Vithoba Temple — spiritual town of Maharashtra

overview.short: The Vithoba Temple, officially known as Shri Vitthal-Rukmini Mandir (Marathi: श्री विठ्ठल-रूक्मिणि देऊळ) is a Hindu temple in Pandharpur, in the Indian state of Maharashtra.
overview.description: The Vithoba Temple, officially known as Shri Vitthal-Rukmini Mandir (Marathi: श्री विठ्ठल-रूक्मिणि देऊळ) is a Hindu temple in Pandharpur, in the Indian state of Maharashtra. It is the main centre of worship for Vithoba, a form of the god Vishnu, and his consort Rakhumai. It is one of the 108 Abhimana Kshethram of Vaishnavate tradition. The temple was built by King Vishnuvardhana (Bittideva) of Hoysala Empire between 1108 and 1152 CE upon being convinced by the historical figure Pundalik.

topPlaces.name: Pandharpur
topPlaces.description: Pandharpur (Pronunciation: [pəɳɖʱəɾpuːɾ]), also Pandaripuram is a popular pilgrimage town, on the banks of Chandrabhagā River, near Solapur city in Solapur District, Maharashtra, India. Its administrative area is one of eleven tehsils in the District, and it is an electoral constituency of the state legislative assembly (vidhan sabha).

items.note: Pandharpur (Pronunciation: [pəɳɖʱəɾpuːɾ]), also Pandaripuram is a popular pilgrimage town, on the banks of Chandrabhagā River, near Solapur city in Solapur District, Maharashtra, India. Its administrative area is one of eleven tehsils in the District, and it is an electoral constituency of the state legislative assembly (vidhan sabha).

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vithoba Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vithoba Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vithoba Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kolhapur Airport (157 km) and the nearest railway station is Solapur Junction (61 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vithoba Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vithoba Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vithoba Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Vithoba Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.
